title: Revolve Group, Inc. (RVLV) Earnings Dates & Report
text: Revolve Group's earnings history demonstrates consistent execution and margin improvement. Recent Earnings Timeline: Q1 2026 (May 5, 2026): EPS $0.20, beat estimate of $0.19. Q4 2024 (Feb 27, 2025): EPS $0.17, beat estimate of $0.10. Q3 2024 (Nov 5, 2024): EPS $0.15, beat estimate of $0.09. Q2 2024 (Aug 6, 2024): EPS $0.21, beat estimate of $0.12. Earnings Streak: The company has beaten earnings estimates in all four of the most recent quarters, with an average earnings surprise of approximately 62%. This consistent pattern reflects strong cost management, operational leverage, and the company's ability to expand margins while growing the top line. Forward Guidance: Management expects Q2 2026 EPS of $0.23 and full-year 2026 EPS of $0.87, representing approximately 35% growth from 2025. This guidance assumes continued double-digit revenue growth and gross margins of 53.5%-54.0%. Upcoming Catalysts: Next earnings report expected August 4, 2026 for Q2 results. Potential catalysts include Miami flagship opening, new beauty brand partnerships, and AI implementation results.
